appliances: Do you have the model number?
When did you buy it? (approximate date is fine)
Do you know the warranty expiry date?
Where is it located? (e.g. Kitchen, Laundry)
How much did it cost approximately?
HVAC: What type of system is it? (split system, ducted, evaporative cooler, ceiling fan)
What filter type does it use? (e.g. 3M electrostatic, standard panel)
When was the last professional service?
Where is the indoor unit located?
plumbing: What type? (hot water system, water meter, irrigation, pump, tap)
Is it gas, electric, or solar?
electrical: What type? (smoke alarm, switchboard, solar panels, EV charger, ceiling fan)
Any battery replacement date you know of?
exterior: What is it? (gutters, roof, deck, fence, driveway, retaining wall, pool)
What material? (e.g. Colorbond, timber, concrete, tile)
When was it installed or last replaced?
Any known issues or recent work done?
Where exactly? (front, back, north side, etc.)
vehicle: When is the next service due? (by date or kilometres)
When is the registration next due?
What fuel type? (petrol, diesel, hybrid, EV)
garden: What is it? (lawn mower, whipper snipper, chainsaw, irrigation controller)
plants_trees: What is the plant or tree? (species or common name, e.g. lemon tree, agapanthus, eucalyptus)
How big is it approximately? (small / medium / large / mature)
Where is it planted? (e.g. front yard, back left corner, pot on deck)
When was it planted or how old is it roughly?
Any known issues or special care requirements?
other: Where is it located or stored?
